panels.title: ${base} — cumulative return since window start (bp). All exchanges start at 0. Binance dives → others curve down with a delay.
panels.description: Each exchange's mid is rebased to its own first-tick value in the visible window. Lag = horizontal gap between Binance's curve and another exchange's curve at any given Y level. Price-level offsets between exchanges are removed.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '/USD') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "pyth_fair" FROM pyth_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', '/USD') AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "bybit" FROM bybit_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "bitget" FROM bitget_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM okx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT-SWAP' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "okx" FROM okx_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}-USDT-SWAP' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM kucoin_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "kucoin" FROM kucoin_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "bingx" FROM bingx_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}-USDT' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "mexc" FROM mexc_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM backpack_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "backpack" FROM backpack_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP') AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM hashkey_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "hashkey" FROM hashkey_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL') AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM kraken_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "kraken" FROM kraken_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "flipster" FROM flipster_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP') AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "hyperliquid" FROM hyperliquid_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "pancake" FROM pancake_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "aster" FROM aster_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

WITH base AS (SELECT first((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) m0 FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT t.timestamp time, ((t.bid_price+t.ask_price)/2.0 / base.m0 - 1) * 10000 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker t CROSS JOIN base WHERE t.symbol='${base}' AND $__timeFilter(t.timestamp) ORDER BY t.timestamp

panels.title: ${base} — raw mid prices (Binance highlighted). Visual lead-lag.
panels.description: Tick-by-tick mid for every exchange. When Binance steps down, watch how long it takes each other exchange's step to follow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pyth_fair" FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '/USD') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bybit" FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bitget" FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "okx" FROM okx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT-SWAP' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "kucoin" FROM kucoin_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bingx" FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "mexc" FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "backpack" FROM backpack_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "hashkey" FROM hashkey_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "kraken" FROM kraken_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "flipster" FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "hyperliquid" FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pancake" FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "aster" FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${base} — last-5-min lag stats vs Binance (avg/stddev/min/max bp dev, tick count)
panels.description: Computed via ASOF JOIN over the past 5 minutes. Higher avg/stddev of |bp dev| and lower tick count both indicate more lag/staleness vs Binance.

targets.rawSql: WITH bin AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), bb AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), bg AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), gt AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), ox AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM okx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT-SWAP' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), kc AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM kucoin_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'XBTUSDTM' ELSE concat('${base}', 'USDTM') END AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), bx AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), mx AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), bp AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM backpack_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '_USDC_PERP') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), hk AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM hashkey_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT-PERPETUAL') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), kr AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM kraken_bookticker WHERE symbol = CASE WHEN '${base}'='BTC' THEN 'PF_XBTUSD' ELSE concat('PF_', '${base}', 'USD') END AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), fl AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM flipster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT.PERP') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), py AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', '/USD') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), hl AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), pa AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), ar AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}', 'USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())), li AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m', -5, now())) SELECT 'bybit' exchange, count() ticks, round(avg((bb.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) avg_bp, round(stddev_samp((bb.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) stddev_bp, round(min((bb.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) min_bp, round(max((bb.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) max_bp FROM bb ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'bitget', count(), round(avg((bg.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((bg.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((bg.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((bg.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM bg ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'gate', count(), round(avg((gt.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((gt.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((gt.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((gt.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM gt ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'okx', count(), round(avg((ox.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((ox.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((ox.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((ox.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM ox ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'kucoin', count(), round(avg((kc.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((kc.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((kc.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((kc.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM kc ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'bingx', count(), round(avg((bx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((bx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((bx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((bx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM bx ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'mexc', count(), round(avg((mx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((mx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((mx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((mx.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM mx ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'backpack', count(), round(avg((bp.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((bp.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((bp.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((bp.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM bp ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'hashkey', count(), round(avg((hk.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((hk.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((hk.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((hk.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM hk ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'kraken', count(), round(avg((kr.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((kr.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((kr.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((kr.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM kr ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'flipster', count(), round(avg((fl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((fl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((fl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((fl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM fl ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'pyth_fair', count(), round(avg((py.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((py.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((py.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((py.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM py ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'hyperliquid', count(), round(avg((hl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((hl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((hl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((hl.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM hl ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake', count(), round(avg((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((pa.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM pa ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'aster', count(), round(avg((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((ar.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM ar ASOF JOIN bin UNION ALL SELECT 'lighter', count(), round(avg((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(stddev_samp((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(min((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3), round(max((li.mid - bin.mid)/bin.mid*10000),3) FROM li ASOF JOIN bin ORDER BY stddev_bp DESC

panels.title: ${base} — BIN vs BNG vs HL only (raw mid)
panels.description: Tick-by-tick mid for every exchange. When Binance steps down, watch how long it takes each other exchange's step to follow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bingx" FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}-USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "hyperliquid" FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${base} — BIN vs Gate only (raw mid)
panels.description: Tick-by-tick mid for every exchange. When Binance steps down, watch how long it takes each other exchange's step to follow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${base} — BIN vs Backpack only (raw mid)
panels.description: Tick-by-tick mid for every exchange. When Binance steps down, watch how long it takes each other exchange's step to follow.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='${base}_USDT' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "backpack" FROM backpack_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${base}','_USDC_PERP') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
